---
title: "Fitness Training Dashboard"
author: "Your Name"
format: dashboard
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

WORKOUT_FILE = Path("workout-log.json")
BODY_WEIGHT_FILE = Path("body-weight.json")


def _read_json_list(path: Path):
    if not path.exists():
        return []
    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    return data if isinstance(data, list) else []


def _write_json_list(path: Path, data):
    with path.open("w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(data, f, indent=2)


def ex(name, sets, reps, load):
    return {
        "name": str(name),
        "sets": int(sets),
        "reps": int(reps),
        "load": float(load),
    }


def record_workout(date, plan, exercises):
    """Append one PPL workout session to workout-log.json."""
    sessions = _read_json_list(WORKOUT_FILE)
    sessions.append(
        {
            "date": str(date),
            "plan": str(plan).lower(),
            "exercises": exercises,
        }
    )
    sessions.sort(key=lambda x: x.get("date", ""))
    _write_json_list(WORKOUT_FILE, sessions)
    return sessions[-1]


def record_body_weight(date, body_weight):
    """Upsert body weight by date in body-weight.json."""
    weights = _read_json_list(BODY_WEIGHT_FILE)
    date = str(date)
    weights = [w for w in weights if w.get("date") != date]
    weights.append({"date": date, "body_weight": float(body_weight)})
    weights.sort(key=lambda x: x.get("date", ""))
    _write_json_list(BODY_WEIGHT_FILE, weights)
    return weights[-1]


# Example input calls (run manually when you want to add data):
# record_workout("2026-04-08", "push", [ex("benchpress", 5, 5, 82.5), ex("squat", 3, 8, 102.5)])
# record_body_weight("2026-04-08", 69.7)

sessions = _read_json_list(WORKOUT_FILE)
body_weight_data = _read_json_list(BODY_WEIGHT_FILE)

records = []
for session in sessions:
    for ex in session["exercises"]:
        records.append(
            {
                "date": session["date"],
                "plan": session["plan"],
                "exercise": ex["name"],
                "sets": ex["sets"],
                "reps": ex["reps"],
                "load": ex["load"],
                "volume": ex["sets"] * ex["reps"] * ex["load"],
            }
        )

df_ex = pd.DataFrame(records)
if not df_ex.empty:
    df_ex["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df_ex["date"])

if not df_ex.empty:
    df_ex_daily = df_ex.pivot_table(
        index="date", columns="exercise", values="volume", aggfunc="sum", fill_value=0
    ).reset_index()
else:
    df_ex_daily = pd.DataFrame(columns=["date", "squat", "benchpress", "pullups"])

for col in ["squat", "benchpress", "pullups"]:
    if col not in df_ex_daily.columns:
        df_ex_daily[col] = 0

df_ex_daily = df_ex_daily.rename(
    columns={
        "squat": "squat_total_volume",
        "benchpress": "benchpress_total_volume",
        "pullups": "pullups_total_volume",
    }
)

df_session = pd.DataFrame([{"date": s["date"], "plan": s["plan"]} for s in sessions])
if not df_session.empty:
    df_session["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df_session["date"])
else:
    df_session = pd.DataFrame(columns=["date", "plan"])

df_weight = pd.DataFrame(body_weight_data)
if not df_weight.empty:
    df_weight["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df_weight["date"])
else:
    df_weight = pd.DataFrame(columns=["date", "body_weight"])

df = (
    df_session.merge(df_ex_daily, on="date", how="left")
    .merge(df_weight, on="date", how="left")
    .sort_values("date")
    .reset_index(drop=True)
)

exercise_cols = [
    "squat_total_volume",
    "benchpress_total_volume",
    "pullups_total_volume",
]
df["total_training_volume"] = df[exercise_cols].sum(axis=1)
```

## Row {height=18%}

```{python}
#| title: Latest Body Weight (kg)
latest_weight = df["body_weight"].iloc[-1]
f"{latest_weight:.1f}"
```

```{python}
#| title: Latest Squat Volume
latest_squat = int(df["squat_total_volume"].iloc[-1])
f"{latest_squat:,}"
```

```{python}
#| title: Latest Bench Press Volume
latest_bench = int(df["benchpress_total_volume"].iloc[-1])
f"{latest_bench:,}"
```

```{python}
#| title: Latest Pull-Ups Volume
latest_pullups = int(df["pullups_total_volume"].iloc[-1])
f"{latest_pullups:,}"
```

## Row {height=42%}

```{python}
#| title: Exercise Volume Trend
long_df = df.melt(
    id_vars=["date"],
    value_vars=exercise_cols,
    var_name="exercise",
    value_name="total_volume",
)

label_map = {
    "squat_total_volume": "Squat",
    "benchpress_total_volume": "Bench Press",
    "pullups_total_volume": "Pull-Ups",
}
long_df["exercise"] = long_df["exercise"].map(label_map)

px.line(
    long_df,
    x="date",
    y="total_volume",
    color="exercise",
    markers=True,
)
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{python}
#| title: Body Weight Trend (kg)
px.line(
  df,
  x="date",
  y="body_weight",
  markers=True,
)
```
